name: Example Expert
description: A minimal expert that validates the Guardian Experts framework.
longDescription: Use this expert to explore structured learning, quizzes, scenarios, and interview practice without domain-specific content.
primaryGoal: Learn how Guardian Experts work and practice core framework capabilities.
disclaimer: This is a demonstration expert for framework validation. Responses are for learning purposes only.

capabilities.title: Learn
capabilities.description: Follow a structured learning path with modules and lessons.

capabilities.title: Ask
capabilities.description: Ask questions grounded in expert knowledge topics.

systemPrompt: You are the Example Expert inside Guardian. Help users learn framework concepts clearly and practically. Stay within the expert's scope. Use concise explanations and actionable guidance.
responseRules: Keep answers focused on the user's question.
Reference relevant learning topics when helpful.
Do not invent capabilities that are not part of this expert.
Encourage the user to complete modules and practice quizzes.
starterQuestions: What is the Guardian Experts framework?
How does expert progress tracking work?
What should I learn first in this expert?

roadmap.title: Getting Started
roadmap.description: Understand the core concepts of Guardian Experts.
learningObjectives: Explain what an expert installation is

roadmap.title: Practice and Assessment
roadmap.description: Apply what you learned through quizzes and scenarios.
learningObjectives: Use interview mode for open-ended practice

knowledgeTopics.title: Expert Installations
knowledgeTopics.summary: An installation links an expert definition to a Guardian profile without copying JSON into user records.
details: Each installation stores expert_id and expert_version.
Progress, quiz attempts, and activity are stored separately in Supabase.
The same expert can be installed on multiple authorized profiles.

examples.title: Profile-scoped install
examples.description: A user installs Example Expert on their personal profile and tracks progress independently.

keyPoints: User data never mutates shared expert JSON
commonMistakes: Assuming progress is stored inside the expert JSON file
Trying to install a coming-soon expert
starterQuestions: How do I install an expert?
Can I install the same expert on two profiles?

knowledgeTopics.title: Capabilities and Routes
knowledgeTopics.summary: Capabilities are defined in JSON and rendered dynamically by the dashboard.
details: Each capability includes id, title, description, icon, route, and enabled flag.
The dashboard does not hardcode capability names.
Routes map to reusable framework screens.

examples.title: Learn capability
examples.description: Opens the roadmap view with modules, lessons, and progress tracking.

keyPoints: New experts add capabilities via JSON only
commonMistakes: Hardcoding expert-specific UI in shared components
starterQuestions: What capabilities does this expert support?

knowledgeTopics.title: Assessment Engines
knowledgeTopics.summary: Quizzes, scenarios, and interview mode reuse generic engines powered by JSON content.
details: Quiz engine supports multiple-choice and true-false questions.
Scenario engine renders flexible context and optional records.
Interview mode evaluates responses server-side using answer guides.

examples.title: Quiz retry
examples.description: Users can retry quizzes; best score and passing status are tracked per installation.

keyPoints: Content lives in JSON; attempts live in Supabase
Interview answer guides are never exposed before a response
commonMistakes: Expecting client-side scoring for interview feedback
starterQuestions: What is the difference between a scenario and an interview question?

glossary.definition: A reusable learning and guidance package defined by a versioned JSON file.
A user-specific link between a Guardian profile and an expert definition.
A navigable feature area such as Learn or Ask, defined in expert JSON.
A ordered learning unit containing objectives, lesson topics, and optional quizzes.
Structured reference content used for lessons and Ask Expert retrieval.

quizzes.title: Framework Basics Quiz
quizzes.description: Check your understanding of Guardian Experts fundamentals.

questions.question: What does a user_experts record store?
options: A full copy of the expert JSON
questions.explanation: Installations reference expert_id and expert_version; content stays in shared JSON files.

questions.question: User module progress is stored inside the expert JSON file.
questions.explanation: Progress is stored in Supabase tables such as expert_module_progress.

questions.question: Who builds the expert system prompt for Ask Expert?
options: The server using expert definition and context
questions.explanation: The server builds prompts from expert definition, safety rules, and retrieved knowledge.

scenarios.title: Choosing the Right Profile
scenarios.notice: This is a fictional learning scenario for framework practice.
scenarios.context: You want to install Example Expert and track progress separately for your personal and work contexts.
scenarios.question: What is the best next step?
choices: Install once and share progress across all profiles automatically
Install the expert separately on each profile where you want independent progress
Copy example-expert.json into your vault documents
Edit the shared JSON to add your user id
scenarios.explanation: Each profile can have its own installation with separate progress while referencing the same expert definition.
learningPoints: Shared JSON remains read-only for users

interviewQuestions.question: Explain how Guardian Experts separate content from user state.
answerGuide: Expert content lives in versioned JSON files
User installations reference expert_id and expert_version
Progress, attempts, and activity are stored in Supabase
RLS protects user data per profile
followUpQuestions: What happens when an expert version is updated?
Why should the client never send a system prompt?

interviewQuestions.question: How would you add a new capability to an expert without changing reusable components?
answerGuide: Add a capability entry to the expert JSON
Ensure route maps to an existing framework screen or add a generic handler
Deploy updated JSON and catalog entry
followUpQuestions: What fields are required on a capability object?

interviewQuestions.question: Describe the Ask Expert request flow from the user's perspective.
answerGuide: User sends user_expert_id and question only
Server verifies ownership and loads expert definition
Server retrieves relevant knowledge and builds the prompt
Response may include citations to knowledge topics
followUpQuestions: Why is expert_id not accepted from the client?
